# TRDG Token
> TRDG is a next-generation cryptocurrency token built for traders, DeFi participants, and the on-chain community. Live charts, tokenomics, and community all in one place.

TRDG is a cryptocurrency token with a dedicated ecosystem including live price charts, tokenomics transparency, a community hub, and a detailed whitepaper. Built for traders who demand real utility, TRDG combines DeFi mechanics with an engaged holder community.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://trdgtoken.com): Token overview, live stats, and community links
- [About](https://trdgtoken.com/about): The mission and story behind TRDG
- [Whitepaper](https://trdgtoken.com/whitepaper): Full technical and economic whitepaper — tokenomics, distribution, and roadmap
- [Stats](https://trdgtoken.com/stats): Live on-chain data — holders, volume, liquidity, and market cap
- [FAQ](https://trdgtoken.com/faq): Common questions about TRDG, how to buy, and token utility

## Key Facts

- Cryptocurrency token with active trading community
- Full tokenomics transparency published in whitepaper
- Live chart and stats dashboard
- Community-driven roadmap
- Available on decentralized exchanges

## Contact

- Website: https://trdgtoken.com
